EPW/src/selfen.f90.role: lower-Fan diagonal contraction and standard self-energy accumulation

EPW/src/wfpt.f90.role: upper-Fan and Debye-Waller matrix interpolation followed by diagonal accumulation

test-suite/ph_ahc_diam/diam.scf.in.role: candidate upstream insulating nonpolar diamond fixture

atomic/pseudo_library/LDA/REL/C.rel-pz-r.role: upstream fully relativistic carbon pseudopotential generator input

lower_fan.standard_contraction: g2 = abs(epf17(jbnd, ibnd, imode, ik))**2 times scalar factors
lower_fan.reason: The standard path forms one scalar modulus squared for each external band and never constructs the off-diagonal product g*_{m n} g_{m n'} required for a complete lower-Fan matrix.

execution.reason_not_executed: Issue 289 requires immediate stop when a complete matrix would have to be newly reconstructed rather than observed before diagonal collapse.

decision.next_permitted_work: A separately authorized analytical design for an external, explicitly scientific matrix Fan contraction or an alternative backend.

claim_boundary: This source-level result does not show that QE or EPW cannot support SOC electron-phonon calculations. It shows only that QE 7.6 / EPW 6.1 does not already compute a complete lower-Fan matrix in the standard path, so the issue-289 observational-export contract cannot pass without a new scientific contraction algorithm.
